meta.title: The Promising Frontiers of U.S.-Japan Cooperation in Defense Trade and Joint Development
meta.description: Arthur Herman, James Schoff, Pierre Chao, Farhad Jalinous, Adele Ratcliff, and James Armington on opportunities for U.S.-Japan cooperation in science and technology in military strategy and defense innovation.
